en: oh look at that oh stays on and everything
i'm sorry what did you just say just say hi oh my god ross ross ben just said hi
ja: ロス！ロス！ベンがやあって言った！
zhTW: 乙羅斯！羅斯！乙班剛說了嗨！
vi: Ross! Ross! Ben vừa nói xin chào!

en: what what just said hi what the word hi yeah no my uncle hi great great and i miss that too
ja: すごい！すごい！それも見逃した！
zhTW: 太棒了！太棒了！我又錯過了！
vi: Tuyệt! Tuyệt! Tôi cũng bỏ lỡ luôn!

en: i miss everything oh i'm sorry i guess i just bring it out in him
ja: ああ、ごめんね。私が引き出しちゃったみたい。
zhTW: 噢，抱歉。我想是我讓他說出來的。
vi: Ồ, xin lỗi. Chắc là tôi khiến bé nói ra.

en: guess what ben just said his first word what did he say something about hi
ja: 聞いて？ベンが初めての言葉を言ったよ。
zhTW: 你猜怎麼著？乙班說了他的第一個字。
vi: Đoán xem? Ben vừa nói từ đầu tiên.

en: oh that's so exciting mommy's so proud of you hi hi you know actually it's more like hi
ja: 実は、もっと「やあ！」って感じだよ！
zhTW: 你知道嗎，其實更像是嗨！
vi: Thực ra, nó giống như là chào hơn!
